protocols.Paper_title: The holin of bacteriophage lambda forms rings with large diameter
protocols.Evidence: S105 was “extracted and purified using” Empigen BB; DDM, OG and LDAO were also reported for purified S105.

protocols.Paper_title: The holin of bacteriophage lambda forms rings with large diameter
protocols.Evidence: IMVs “produced by the passage of cells expressing S105” were used as membrane-associated S105 for proteolysis studies.

protocols.Paper_title: The holin of bacteriophage lambda forms rings with large diameter
protocols.Evidence: Cells were lysed by French press; lysates were cleared by centrifugation; membrane pellets were solubilized in EBB, DDM, β-OG or LDAO.
